message:
bd-3fc.5: Deterministic replay test framework via FrankenLab

Extend lab_integration with record/replay/assert API for deterministic
test verification.

New types and methods:
- Recording: captures config, frame checksums, event log from a run
- ReplayResult: match/divergence status with first-divergence index
- Lab::record(config, model, closure) → Recording
- Lab::replay(recording, model, closure) → ReplayResult
- Lab::assert_replay_deterministic() for one-shot record+replay+assert
- assert_outputs_match() for comparing two LabOutputs

Tracing: lab.record and lab.replay spans with scenario_name/seed fields.
Logging: INFO for recording start/stop, WARN for divergence detection.
Metrics: lab_recordings_total and lab_replays_total atomic counters.

13 new tests including 100-seed replay determinism proof,
divergence detection, counter increment verification.
Total: 32 tests in lab_integration module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
